title: Flaky Australian Tomato Soup
description: A bitter, flaky, hangovercure tomato soup with a spicy kick and a crisp crumb topping, designed to soothe the day after a night out.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and grated carrot, sauté until softened (about 5 minutes).
Stir in minced garlic and grated ginger, cooking for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add smoked paprika, turmeric powder, and salt; cook for 1 minute to toast the spices.
Pour in tomato juice and bring to a gentle simmer; let it cook for 10 minutes to meld flavors.
Reduce heat to low, stir in coconut milk, and simmer for another 5 minutes.
Remove from heat, let cool slightly, then blend the soup until smooth using an immersion blender or transfer to a blender.
Return the soup to the saucepan, season with black pepper, taste and adjust salt if needed.
Serve hot, sprinkling toasted rye bread crumbs on top for a flaky finish, and enjoy!
